# Visualize a Waveform

## Lesson Goal

Plot amplitude over time.

## What to Notice

Students should learn to pair listening with visual inspection.

## Work With the Notebook

- [Open the notebook source](https://github.com/buildLittleWorlds/marimo-audio-self-tutorial/blob/main/notebooks/06_visualize_waveform/notebook.py)
- [Run the browser notebook](https://buildlittleworlds.github.io/marimo-audio-self-tutorial/notebooks/06_visualize_waveform/)

Run locally:

```bash
uv run marimo edit notebooks/06_visualize_waveform/notebook.py
```

## Feedback Lens

Ask what the plot makes visible that listening alone does not.

## Instructor Notes

Use this lesson as a small checkpoint. Before asking students to add features,
ask them to name the input, the transformation, the output, and the current
limitation. That habit will matter more in later transcription notebooks than
any one line of code.
